# OpenStack Dev

> OpenStack Dev is a full-stack, mobile, ERP, and DevOps development agency based in India,
> serving clients globally. This site also hosts a free, curated catalog of open source
> DevOps/infrastructure tools, official download hubs for Git and OpenStack, and step-by-step
> install guides for every tool in the catalog.

We design, build, and deploy production-grade web apps, mobile apps, ERP systems, and DevOps
infrastructure. Stack: Next.js, NestJS, TypeScript, iOS Swift, Android Kotlin, PostgreSQL,
Docker, Kubernetes.

## Agency

- [Home](https://openstackgit.com/): Services, portfolio, tech stack, and contact information.

## Downloads

- [Open Source DevOps Tools Catalog](https://openstackgit.com/downloads): ~65 open source
  infrastructure and DevOps tools across 14 categories (IaaS, IaC, CI/CD, container
  orchestration, monitoring, secrets management, service mesh, and more), each linking to its
  official download source. Each tool also has a dedicated page at
  `/downloads/{category}/{tool}` with a live version-history archive pulled from GitHub.
- [Download Git](https://openstackgit.com/download-git): Official Git download links for
  Windows, macOS, and every major Linux distribution.
- [Download & Install OpenStack](https://openstackgit.com/download-openstack): Every official
  OpenStack deployment path — DevStack, Kolla-Ansible, OpenStack-Ansible, Canonical Sunbeam,
  RDO/Packstack, and Ubuntu Cloud Archive.

## Guides

- [Install Guides](https://openstackgit.com/blog): Step-by-step install and setup guides for
  every tool in the DevOps catalog, each with prerequisites, copy-paste commands, a verification
  step, and links to official documentation.

## Contact

- Email: hello@openstackgit.com
- Contact form: https://openstackgit.com/#contact
